arts.ttl: De Roon Recovers from Injury, Set to Join Atalanta in Barcelona
arts.sum: Marten De Roon has made a swift recovery from his recent head injury and is ready to rejoin Atalanta for their crucial Champions League match against Barcelona. The Dutch midfielder, who was forced to leave the field during Saturday's game against Como due to a head trauma, has been cleared to play after participating in regular training with the team.
